title: ornithopteris rugosula
intro: Ornithopteris rugosula, a type of fern species, is a rare and endangered plant native to New Zealand. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ornithopteris rugosula include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and support immune function. In traditional Māori medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
